title: McCarthy Tétrault honored with Americas Energy Tax Deal of the Year
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault honored with Americas Energy Tax Deal of the Year
Toronto, September 17, 2018 — McCarthy Tétrault proudly celebrates being awarded the Americas Energy Tax Deal of the Year at the 13 th annual Americas Tax Awards, hosted by the International Tax Review in New York City on September 13. Celebrating the largest, most innovative, complex and impactful client work, the awards recognize  transactions, planning or cases that break new ground and set market precedents.
This award recognizes the firm’s work on Enbridge Inc. ’s acquisition of Spectra Energy Corp in 2017 . The C$37 billion transaction is the largest foreign acquisition ever completed by a Canadian company and resulted in Enbridge becoming North America’s largest energy infrastructure company.
This year the firm received a total of 12 nominations with Christian Meighen, Practice Group Leader for our national tax practice accepting the award on the firm’s behalf. Partners and tax lawyers Ron Mar and Rob Nearing both played instrumental roles in the winning transaction.
“We are honoured by our continuing success at the annual Americas Tax Awards,” Christian Meighen said. “Winning this award is a testament to our firm’s ongoing commitment to innovation and putting clients first, to get even the most complex deals over the line.”
McCarthy Tétrault’s Tax Group is distinguished as one of Canada’s top-ranked tax practices. With more than 40 lawyers across Canada, the group has extensive experience advising leading national and multinational companies on a variety of tax-related matters including planning and disputes, and developing novel tax strategies that are efficient from both Canadian and international perspectives.
International Tax Review is a prominent and trusted source of news and analysis serving the international corporate tax community. The Americas Tax Awards celebrate the most innovative tax and transfer pricing advice of 2017/2018 and the in-house teams, firms and individuals that were part of it. Firms from more than 12 countries in North, South and Central America compete for the awards.

#### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
- Christian Meighen Partner People.Offices.Singular Montréal
